runner_fix_result.original_script: phase16-12c-fixed-inspect.py — failed (in-process token refresh degraded scopes)
runner_fix_result.final_approach: Bash-level token refresh + inline python3 -c batches of 10-15 URLs
runner_fix_result.token_management: refresh-gsc-token.py before each batch preserves webmasters scope
runner_fix_result.rate_limit_handling: 1.5s inter-call delay, 8s socket timeout, retry on 429
lessons: In-process token refresh (google.auth) degrades scopes to analytics.readonly
Must use refresh-gsc-token.py externally to preserve webmasters scope
API latency is 7s per call — plan batch sizes accordingly (10-15 URLs per 180s window)
Background processes with complex quoting silently fail — use script files or simple inline -c
Heredoc-based Python execution stalls on API calls — use inline -c only

key_findings: Tier 1 calculators (10/10) and decision pages (15/15) are ALL indexed — good foundation
Tier 2/3 calculators are overwhelmingly NOT indexed (88/95 discovered-not-indexed) — Google sees them as low-value
All 223 tool pages and 35 compare pages are inferred as NEUTRAL (not indexed) — programmatic thin content problem
Blog posts show 32% index rate (32/98) — mixed quality signal from Google
No technical blockers found: no robots blocks, no noindex, no 404s, no redirects
Root problem: Google's quality assessment of content — not a technical indexing issue
Avg position 33.2 with 0 clicks confirms even indexed pages rank too deep for traffic
API-only approach confirmed reliable; correction factor (1.434x) working for performance data
